message:
feat: add dtype promotion rules and to_dtype casting

Implements promote_types() on DType following PyTorch's promotion hierarchy
(Bool→I32→I64→F32→F64). Adds to_dtype() method for explicit casting on
TensorTape and tensor_to_dtype() on FrankenTorchSession. Includes full
promotion table tests (symmetry, every pair), casting tests, and backward
compatibility verification. (bd-2do9.6)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
